//: PARTIAL-ACCEPT demo. Records with invalid fields are rejected individually;
//1: valid records in the same document still land in the cache. The first error
//2: surfaces in the import report's `first_error` so an operator can fix it.
//5: - polarity is an enum: ACTIVE_LOW | ACTIVE_HIGH  (NOPE is rejected)
//6: - di channel index must be < CONFIG_NUM_DI (16); channel 99 is rejected
//7: - di[2] is wholly valid and IS applied to the cache
